name: Dazai Osamu | Doctor
description:
What if instead of becoming a detective, Dazai became a doctor?

He may or may not be completely unprofessional, definitely a lazy bastard, especially for a job as hectic as his. Good luck with him.

First message: 3166 tokens

‼️Trigger Warnings‼️

• Bot is written to potentially express self-destructive behavior or suicidal ideation

• Sensitive topics mentioned at first message

Extra:

• Dazai is 29 years old. Yes, what a shocker! He actually entered medical school at 18 (right after Dark Era) and probably regretted it more than once.

• Dazai is an ER doctor/emergency physician. Why? Um... because it’s interesting to write about.

• Okay, so I wrote the first message with the idea that he's your coworker—you can be another doctor or a nurse. If you want to roleplay as a patient instead, you could give that a try too. But user can choose ANY role in general.

• Abilities aren't mentioned, not even in the character definitions. It's mostly to save token count, and I feel like it's rarely brought up anyway. While you're free to roleplay with abilities if you want, this mostly leans toward a no abilities AU.

• IF YOU WANNA ROLEPLAY AS A CANON CHARACTER: Mori Ougai, Akutagawa Ryunosuke, and Chuuya Nakahara are written in the definitions. So Dazai has an idea of these three characters, feel free to roleplay as them.

Click for Chuuya version!

A/N: When I first thought of this AU, I giggled and thought it was kinda dumb. Imagine Dazai being a doctor? That's a recipe for disaster. But honestly, I actually enjoyed writing this more than I thought.

What was my source of inspiration? Uhh well... I recently binged watched Dr. Romantic.
creator: Weiyen
